summary: hipEngine full OPTIMAL Qwen3.5-PARO inference parity benchmark is blocked before LLM.generate and dependency ports land

software.hipcc_version:
HIP version: 7.2.53211-d40244d
AMD clang version 22.0.0git (/startdir/rocm-llvm f58b06dce1f9c15707c5f808fd002e18c2accf7e)
Target: x86_64-pc-linux-gnu
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /opt/rocm/lib/llvm/bin

commands.benchmark:
python3 - <<'PY'
from hipengine import LLM, SamplingParams
LLM('/models/.../Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-PARO', quant='w4_paro').generate('...', SamplingParams(max_tokens=128))
PY

baseline.name: source-lineage parent OPTIMAL 512/128 and 4K/128 local refresh

decision.reason: Blocked: hipEngine LLM.generate, w4_paro loader/layout, Qwen3.5 model plugin, MoE/attention/linear/lm_head kernels, and graph replay are not landed yet.

notes: Use docs/KERNELS.md Current OPTIMAL MoE port checklist to unblock this benchmark.
